name: Bunch of Beast Bodies
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>累</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>るい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>々</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>るい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Change all monsters that were not Normal or Special Summoned this turn to Defense Position. For the rest of this turn, a player who controls a Defense Position monster cannot declare attacks with monsters that were Normal or Special Summoned this turn.
eff: Change all monsters that were not Normal or Special Summoned this turn to Defense Position. For the rest of this turn, a player who controls a Defense Position monster cannot declare attacks with monsters that were Normal or Special Summoned this turn.
